pipeline: select a naturally compatible topic and product
reuse approved local Brand Connect product data
resolve the product or affiliate URL only after approval
extract verifiable product images, functions, price, and evidence
choose UGC, comparison, demonstration, or lifestyle story format
produce script, storyboard, and short-form asset
adapt the same evidence into Reels, Shorts, and blog assets
publish or issue affiliate links only after owner approval
measure real clicks and conversions before promoting a pattern
revenue_paths: Coupang Partners as the first locally relevant route
Amazon Associates as a possible later international route
LinkPrice as a possible later domestic network route

image_prompt_library.purpose: Convert abstract design intent into reusable, concrete image-generation instructions.
prompt_dimensions: camera type, angle, distance, and composition
lighting direction, softness, and color temperature
background, negative space, and product placement
surface, material, texture, grain, and exposure
text-safe area and carousel crop requirements

prompt_fragments: natural available light and believable shadow
slight grain and mild exposure variation
clearly visible material and surface detail
product naturally placed in a believable lived-in space
sell the feeling of a life containing the product

image_prompt_library.unknown_reference: The source mentions four creative tones, but the fourth was not visible and remains intentionally unfilled.
